mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (activity_name, activity_desc, start_time, end_time, create_user_id, create_user_name, status) VALUES (#{activityName}, #{activityDesc}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE activity
activity_name = #{activityName}, activity_desc = #{activityDesc}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status},
WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE activity SET deleted = 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
